author: bfonta
body: Add $p_{\text{T}}(\tau)$ and $|\eta(\tau)|$ pre-selections to the tau validation at generation and reconstruction level. This is achieved by filtering all generated and reconstructed tau collections. The cuts are made configurable. --------- Minor updates: + make it clear that `wpValuesForTau[i]` stores booleans (one per WP). + use `else if` instead of `if` to clarify that `use_wp` and `use_raw` cannot be active at the same time + general declutter by using a few references ------------------ PR tested locally with a few events:
title: Add pre-selections to the Tau Validation.
